Product · Design · Technology

Hi,
I'm Amal.

A consultant with experience in tech and design. I find myself at the intersection of business, design and technology — using storytelling to build products people actually want to use.

Currently pursuing a Master's in Integrated Innovation at Carnegie Mellon University. Previously at EY, building enterprise platforms for compliance, change management, and organizational strategy.

Scroll to explore

Who I am

The three worlds.

From making films and creating applications to being at the intersection of business and technology at EY — I find myself in a unique position knowing three worlds very well. Using my skills as a storyteller, I create narratives through my designs, taking users on a walk through the product and making accessibility a priority.

01

Technology

Electronics and Computer Science graduate. Built enterprise systems with Python, SQL, PowerApps, React and Java. Comfortable across the full stack — from data pipelines to front-end experiences.

02

Design

Trained in human-centered design at CMU. Filmmaking was my first foray — it shaped everything: narrative, pacing, and the emotional journey through a product.

03

Business

Three years at EY translating ambiguous organizational problems into platforms and strategies. Comfortable with executive stakeholders, business cases, and the messy space between a problem and its solution.

College & Passion

Filmmaking was my first foray into design.

All three films were made during quarantine — written, directed, and edited entirely by me using Premiere Pro. Storytelling is a primary feature of everything someone creates and others perceive.

View project

Wake Up

A film about voting — what started as an experiment became a realization of how much is possible within your own room.

What You See in the Dark

Short Film · 2021

Everything is OK

The most experimental — no title card, tells its story entirely through cinema. Explores media control through a broken national personification.
